Name: Pixellot
Hero Headline: Grow your live broadcast audience with Spalk.
Hero Subhead: Our Virtual Sportscasting Studio makes it easy for you to produce live commentary for your broadcasts directly from the Pixellot console.
Welcome Body: Welcome to Spalk! We are excited to have you using our software to add commentary to your Pixellot live streams. On this page you will find resources to help you get started.
Checklist — Microphone Copy:
Microphone recommendations:

  • Lip-Ribbon Microphones
  • USB streaming mics
  • XLR to USB converters or USB microphones acceptable
SEO Description: Resources for Pixellot commentators using Spalk: hardware checklist, tutorial videos, and best practices for live commentary.

Name: FloSports
Hero Headline: Grow your live broadcast audience with Spalk.

Welcome Body: Welcome to Spalk! We are excited to have you using our software to add commentary to your FloSports broadcasts. On this page you will find resources that can help you begin your broadcasting journey.
Checklist — Microphone Copy:

SEO Description: Resources for FloSports commentators on Spalk: checklist, tutorials, and a training session to get your home studio broadcast-ready.

Name: NFHS
Hero Headline: Grow your School's live broadcast audience with Spalk.
Hero Subhead: Our Virtual Sportscasting Studio makes it easy for you to produce live commentary for your school's broadcasts on the NFHS Network.
Welcome Body: Welcome to Spalk! We are excited to have you using our software to broadcast your school's events on the NFHS Network. In the resources below you will find everything you need to get started with commentary on our platform.
Checklist — Microphone Copy:
Microphone recommendations:

  • Lip-Ribbon Microphones
  • USB gaming mics
  • USB mics preferred but XLR to USB converter also acceptable
SEO Description: Live commentary resources for school broadcasters on the NFHS Network using Spalk's Virtual Commentary Studio.
